packageRules.description: Automerge non-major updates for development dependencies
Automerge non-major updates for production dependencies with good test coverage

Transitive pins for the shipped analyzer DLL. These run inside the user's compiler host (.NET 8 SDK minimum), so major versions must not exceed what that host provides. Caps: System.Collections.Immutable <=8.x, System.Reflection.Metadata <=8.x. See: https://github.com/rjmurillo/moq.analyzers/issues/850

AnalyzerUtilities is bundled in the shipped analyzer. Version 4.14.0+ pulls System.Collections.Immutable 9.0.0.0, which fails in .NET 8 SDK hosts (CS8032). Capped at <4.14.0. See: https://github.com/rjmurillo/moq.analyzers/issues/850
System.Formats.Asn1 is a transitive pin for the shipped analyzer. Manual review required for major updates. See: https://github.com/rjmurillo/moq.analyzers/issues/850

Perfolizer version is dictated by BenchmarkDotNet's exact version constraint [0.6.1]. Updating independently causes NU1608 warnings and potential runtime failures. Disable Renovate for Perfolizer; update manually when BenchmarkDotNet bumps its Perfolizer dependency. See PR #968 for context.
BenchmarkDotNet updates require manual review to verify Perfolizer transitive pin compatibility.
System.CommandLine requires PerfDiff code changes when updated. See: https://github.com/rjmurillo/moq.analyzers/issues/914
